title: Dressrosa's Toys Become Human
description: Pages 12–16 focus on dressrosa's toys become human, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Marines as the country erupts after Sugar's spell breaks, the underground victims return, and Doflamingo's secret rule begins collapsing in public.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is sebio in the south...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: All the toys working at the port...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: urgent report!! This is karta in the east!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The toys are turning into former dress- Rosa soldiers!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Cal-ling the Palace!! Calling the Palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The Pirates are going crazy... Aghh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Everything we've built up over these ten years....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sugar
dialogue.text: Somebody must have taken out sugar, oiling!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That damned Midget's Gone ( and failed us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I just hope she's not hurt...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I'm grateful for your efforts. Thanks to you, I'm human again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: He really did it!! The SOP Operation is a success!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Look at you, so terrible injured... all for our sake....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: We'll build a statue of you for sure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Now you must...Seek help from my crewmates... the real bat- tle...starts here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Calling the Palace!!: Palace, please respond!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Young Master!! The emergency reports just won't stop coming in!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Get out here, Doflamingo!! We're gonna kill ya!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: It turned into a weird man!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: We must report to the govern-ment!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Hey!! Where did the soldier go?!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: The Tontatta's Operation has SUC- Ceeded...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: I had....!! I had for- gotten all about him...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Hey, what are you talking about?! who is he?!! Where's the soldier?!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: All the toys in this country were originally human!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: And the people who had been turned into toys disappeared from everyone's memories!!

dialogue.speaker: Sugar
dialogue.text: But now that the culprit, sugar, has been defeated... All of our memories have returned...

summary: Dressrosa's Toys Become Human develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
